title: Falling Wind
description:
Reimagining the elytra fly sound effect.
A simple mod that adds dynamic wind sounds while you're falling, using the elytra sound effect.
body:
# Falling Wind **A simple mod that adds dynamic wind sounds while you're falling, using the elytra sound effect.**
[![Support me on Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59496f4b454cbfb432f45bce418a880e628c4e6b.png)](https://ko-fi.com/lythro)
## What it does When you fall in Minecraft, you'll hear wind sounds that get louder the faster you fall. It uses the vanilla elytra sound, so it fits right in with the game. - Volume changes based on how fast you're falling - Client-side only - works on any server - Fully configurable through [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) --- ## Showcase --- ## Requirements - Minecraft **>= 1.21.11** - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) --- ## Great for Parkour maps, skyblock, or just making falling more fun.
